name: White Chocolate Cheesecake with Raspberry Sau
recipeInstructions:
1. Place white chocolate in a double boiler and heat over hot water until melted.
2. Stir to blend and let cool to room temperature.
3. With an electric mixer, blend cream cheese and sugar until smooth. Mix in eggs, vanilla extract, and sour cream. Stir in the melted chocolate.
4. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch springform pan.
5. Bake in the middle of a preheated 325°F oven for 25 minutes or until just barely set.
6. Turn off the oven and leave the door slightly ajar. Let cool in the oven for 1 hour longer.
7. Chill completely.
8. Dust cocoa powder through a sieve to make a ring around the cheesecake.
9. Prepare raspberry sauce by reserving half a cup of raspberries for garnish. Puree the remaining berries and push through a sieve. Stir in sugar to taste.
10. To serve, spoon raspberry sauce onto dessert plates. Remove pan sides of cheesecake and cut into wedges. Place wedges on top of the raspberry sauce and garnish with berries.
